div1.entryFree: Bladder, the bag in the body which serves as the receptacle of the urine: --s full of imposthume, Troil. V, 1, 24. Taken out and inflated with air, it serves for several purposes: blows a man up like a b. H4A II, 4, 366. swim on --s, H8 III, 2, 359. --s and musty seeds, Rom. V, 1, 46.
